texto: Sometimes when Anna is talking to Louise she sees words coming out of her mouth like fistfuls of stones. But she doesn't intend to spew stones
autor: it's simply the only way Anna knows how to takl to her mother.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it's simply the only way Anna knows how to takl to her mother.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Sometimes when Anna is talking to Louise she sees words coming out of her mouth like fistfuls of …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, jessica-anya-blau, stones pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
